# Framer Marketplace Templates

**Source:** https://www.framer.com/marketplace/templates/
**Scraped:** 2026-04-21
**Scope:** marketplace root + category index + dashboard/SaaS detail pages
**License:** Fair-use research reference. Designer credited per-item. Public preview URLs captured but not live-mirrored. Do NOT redistribute.

Framer is a design-forward marketplace with heavy dashboard / SaaS / dark-theme density. Source HTML is NOT exposed (no-code compiled framer.website pages), so value is VISUAL patterns + compositional references. Each template has a public preview at `<slug>.framer.website/`.

## Top 10 Clawmachine-fit picks

Ranked by operator-dashboard / dark-first / reseller-ops relevance:

1. **Dash ($59, Yadwinder Singh)** - SaaS template: landing / customer stories / changelog / pricing / about / contact / blog with filters. Warm dark grey palette, custom illustrations, smooth interactions. `previews/dash-framer.png`. 4.9K views. Multi-page.
2. **DashSynt ($29, Asad Synt)** - Modern clean SaaS layout, home + 404 + privacy. `previews/dashsynt-framer.png`. 2.4K views. Minimum viable SaaS page kit at lowest price.
3. **Dashcraft ($59, Emily Clarke)** - Creative design agency with built-in analytics, custom cursors, overlays/modals, project styles, components. Agency/AI/startup crossover; 14+ pages. `previews/dashcraft-framer.png`. 3.5K views.
4. **Dashbar ($80, Masbobz Works)** - Sidebar-styled personal website: projects / products / articles / bookmarks. Closest Framer analogue to the dashboard-as-portfolio stitch. Light+dark theme, CMS. `previews/dashbar-framer.png`. 3.6K views.
5. **Aegis ($109, Dan W)** - Premium AI + SaaS template. Obsidian-toned, cinematic dark-mode, enterprise-grade UI mockups, bento grids, pricing tiers, competitive comparison table. `previews/aegis-framer.png`. 820 views.
6. **Dashfolio N2 ($129, Cedric)** - Flagship dashboard-style portfolio. Mobile-first rebuild, 14 page types, premium page transitions + appear animations, dark sidebar system, 100/100 SEO out of the box. Most expensive on the list but most comprehensive. `previews/dashfolio-n2-framer.png`. 858 views.
7. **Dashdark X / Dashflow X / DashKit (BRIX Templates)** - Listed in the map output but lives on Webflow side. See `webflow-templates/` subdir.
8. **Dark (BRIX Templates)** - URL `framer.com/marketplace/templates/dark` - tailored for modern tech: startups / software / SaaS. Companion to Dash.
9. **Vector (Cristian Mielu)** - SaaS template, versatile + clean. Listed with strong SaaS positioning.
10. **Nexus (Pawel Gola)** - Minimal SaaS template for fintech startups, tech startups. Clean minimal dark.

## Other dashboard-adjacent Framer slugs discovered (not individually scraped but indexed)

From `framer.com/marketplace/templates/` map, all carry dash/dashboard keywords:
- `dashfolio-neo`, `dashfolio-plus`, `dashbar`, `dashcraft`, `dashsynt`, `dashbrdx`, `dashly-x`, `dash` (multiple)
- AI/SaaS adjacents: `aegis`, `ainest`, `aihub`, `agentix`, `aithor`, `aixor`, `aiphot`, `aiwork`, `ailex`, `claura`, `crypto`, `apiq`, `alytics`, `prospects`, `aurius`
- Dark-specific: `dark` (BRIX), `ailex` (dark-mode AI landing), `athos-dark`, `future` (cyberpunk folio)

## Notes

- The Framer marketplace root scrape + dashboard-category-map yielded 121+ unique template slugs (saved to scrape-cache). A subset of 6 highest-fit detail pages was fully fetched with screenshots.
- All detail pages carry feature tags (A11y, Animations, CMS, Components, Forms, Visual Breakpoints, Sticky Scrolling, Overlays/Modals, Light & Dark Theme, Layout Templates).
- Source code NOT extractable (Framer outputs compiled sites), so these act as COMPOSITIONAL / VISUAL references, not carry-forward code.
- Preview-your-own inside Framer is $0 copy then edit.
